onboard: Remote (RKE) only — not DIY available per locksmithkeyless.com (2007+ Altima requires diagnostic equipment). The earlier ignition-insert-remove 6× method applies only to pre-2007 Altima and does NOT program the NATS transponder chip.
addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or Lonsdor K518 / OBDSTAR X300 DP) to OBD port under dash driver side. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → select year → Smart key or Remote head key → Add key. Tool reads BCM and may calculate 20-digit NATS PIN automatically via OBD (NATS5/NATS5+ generation). Present all existing keys plus new key when prompted; follow ignition-cycle prompts on screen. Erase-all then re-register all keys including working original.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 (or Lonsdor K518) to OBD. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → year → All keys lost. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Follow guided prompts: turn hazard on, ignition off, insert/present new key, ignition on per tool instructions. If OBD PIN read fails, read 5-digit hex code from BCM label (behind left kick panel) and use NATS PIN calculator to derive 4-digit working PIN.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD (Autel/Lonsdor auto-read) | BCM label 5-digit hex → decode to 4-digit PIN
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
securityWait: none documented for programming; vehicle enters start-lockout after 5+ consecutive bad-key start attempts (P1610) — clear with scan tool
specialTool: Autel IM608 | Lonsdor K518 | OBDSTAR X300 DP

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 (or Lonsdor K518 / OBDSTAR X300 DP) to OBD port under dash driver side. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → year → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD on 2007–2012 smart-key trims (higher trim push-start). Present new key on start button when prompted; follow all ignition prompts. All keys must be re-registered in one session.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 (or Lonsdor K518) to OBD. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → year → Smart key → All keys lost. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN via OBD automatically. Turn hazard on, ignition off, follow guided key-present-to-start-button prompts. If PIN read fails via OBD, use BCM label 5-digit hex + NATS calculator.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD | BCM label 5-digit hex → decode to 4-digit PIN
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 | Lonsdor K518 | OBDSTAR X300 DP

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Xhorse VVDI2 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → year → All key types → Add key (guided). Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Have all existing keys on hand — system erases and re-registers all keys. Follow tool-guided prompts: hazard on, ignition off, present each key to start button sequentially.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. 20-digit NATS PIN read from BCM via OBD (tool auto-reads on most units). Navigate AKL path; delete all key IDs, then program new keys. 2016–2018 units use HiTag AES (PCF7953M/ID4A) — requires tool with HITAG AES support (Autel IM608 with latest update, VVDI2, Lonsdor K518).
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD (auto-read by tool)
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 (HITAG AES update required for 2016–2018) | Xhorse VVDI2 | Lonsdor K518

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Altima → year → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD (2019–2021). For 2022+ if PIN cannot be read via OBD alone, use Nissan 40-pin BCM gateway cable (OBDSTAR or Autel BCM40 cable). Have all existing keys; system re-registers all in one session.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 to OBD + 40-pin BCM cable for 2021+ if OBD PIN read fails. Navigate AKL. For 2022+ models: if tool asks for PIN code, remove HFM module (hands-free module above glove box), use Autel APB131 adapter or OBDSTAR G3 with RH850 kit to read 28-digit PIN from HFM EEPROM dump, then enter in tool for key learning.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN via OBD (2019–2021) | 28-digit PIN from HFM module EEPROM (2022+, requires APB131 or RH850 adapter)
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, left of steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 with APB131 adapter (2022+) | OBDSTAR G3 with RH850 adapter (2022+) | Nissan 40-pin BCM gateway cable

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 / OBDSTAR X300 DP to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Sentra → year → Remote head key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. All existing keys must be re-registered in same session. Follow tool-guided prompts.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM. Navigate AKL path; erase all IDs, program new remote head key. If OBD PIN read fails, use BCM label 5-digit hex + NATS PIN calculator.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD | BCM label 5-digit hex → decode to 4-digit PIN
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, near steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 | Lonsdor K518 | OBDSTAR X300 DP

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 / OBDSTAR X300 DP to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Sentra → year → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Have all existing keys on hand for re-registration in one session. Follow tool-guided prompts: hazard on, ignition off, present each key to start button when prompted.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. Navigate AKL. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD (auto-read). Erase all existing key IDs, program new smart keys sequentially on start button. ID46/HiTag2 chip on these years — standard NATS OBD procedure.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD (auto-read by tool)
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, near steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 | Lonsdor K518 | OBDSTAR X300 DP

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD port + optional Nissan 40-pin BCM cable for PIN read. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Sentra B18 → year → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN via OBD or 40-pin cable. Have all keys; system erases and re-registers all in one session.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 to OBD + Nissan 40-pin BCM gateway cable. Navigate AKL path. For 2021+ B18 Sentra: if PIN not readable via OBD, use APB131 adapter to read 28-digit PIN from HFM module EEPROM (above glove box), then enter in key learning. OBDSTAR G3 + RH850 adapter is an alternative PIN extraction method.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN via OBD or 40-pin BCM cable (2020) | 28-digit PIN from HFM EEPROM via APB131/RH850 (2021+)
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, near steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 + APB131 adapter (2021+) | OBDSTAR G3 + RH850 (2021+) | Nissan 40-pin BCM cable

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 to OBD port + Nissan 40-pin BCM gateway cable (may be required). Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Sentra B18 → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 28-digit PIN from HFM module via APB131 or calculates via 40-pin cable. Have all existing keys for re-registration.
allKeysLost: Use Autel IM608 + APB131 adapter: remove HFM module above glove box, solder/connect APB131 to read EEPROM dump, extract 28-digit PIN. Alternatively use OBDSTAR G3 + RH850/V850 adapter kit for PIN from HFM dump. Enter PIN into key learning via hot functions. New FCC KR5TXPZ1 hardware.
pinSource: 28-digit PIN from HFM module EEPROM (above glove box) via Autel APB131 or OBDSTAR G3 + RH850 adapter
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, near steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 + APB131 adapter | OBDSTAR G3 + RH850/V850 adapter kit

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 / OBDSTAR X300 DP to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Rogue → year → Remote head key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. Navigate AKL path. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Erase all key IDs, program new remote head key following guided prompts. If OBD PIN read fails, use BCM label 5-digit hex + NATS PIN calculator.

addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Xhorse VVDI2 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Rogue T32 → year → Smart key → Add key (guided). Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Have all existing keys; system erases all and re-registers in one session. Follow prompts: hazard on, ignition off/on, present each key to start button.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Rogue → year → 20-bit PIN → AKL. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD automatically. Erase all key IDs, then program each new smart key. Warning: several BCM part numbers (284B1-4CB1A series, 2014–2018) are defective — verify BCM PN before programming or BCM may be permanently disabled.

allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 to OBD + Nissan 40-pin BCM cable. Navigate AKL. If 40-pin cable AKL is successful, proceed with key learning. If tool still asks for PIN (security update), remove HFM module above glove box and use Autel APB131 adapter or OBDSTAR G3 + RH850 kit to read 28-digit PIN from EEPROM dump, then enter PIN in key learning.

onboard: Smart key (CWTWBU624): No DIY procedure available — requires diagnostic equipment. Remote head key (if applicable): Insert and remove key from ignition 6 times within 10 seconds until hazard lights flash; turn to ACC, press LOCK button within 5 seconds per remote; all remotes must be present — any omitted become inactive. NOTE: this programs RKE only; NATS transponder chip still requires professional tool.
addKey: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD port. Navigate: IMMO → Nissan → Armada TA60 → year → Smart key → Add key. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Have all existing keys for re-registration. ID46 PCF7952 chip.
allKeysLost: Connect Autel IM608 / Lonsdor K518 to OBD. Navigate AKL path. Tool reads 20-digit NATS PIN from BCM via OBD. Erase all key IDs, program new smart keys. BCM label fallback if OBD PIN read fails.
pinSource: 20-digit BCM PIN read via OBD | BCM label 5-digit hex → decode to 4-digit PIN (fallback)
obdPort: Under dash, driver side, near steering column
specialTool: Autel IM608 | Lonsdor K518
